title: The Wax gourd
description: Farmer's Delight's plugin，Ancient winter melon originating from ancient times
body:
![candle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddf1cadc374f1d999fed74f6a9ffbda90ba786c1_0.webp)

![home](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6753b02a47e18175eb1002dd2039a657e55e663_0.webp)

![small home](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2148bbcaa3db9fffbcace19d44ea63f30f3a2a36_0.webp)
----

This mod has added a giant winter melon discovered by Sniffer.


## Blocks：
> Winter Melon Block: A huge winter melon block that is one of the basic blocks that make up a large winter melon. It can be used as a wooden board and can be break into a Small Winter Melon.
> 
> Winter Melon Stem: The stem of a giant winter melon can be used as fuel.
> 
## Items：
> Small Winter Melon: After eating it, restore hunger and gain some buff effects.  Melon Block may cause it to drop, and it can be synthesized into Golden Winter Melon.
> 
> Golden Winter Melon: a melon that looks like a golden apple, but can be made from gold.
> 

## Other
Giant winter melon seedlings can be discovered by Sniffer, and the seedlings can be planted on the ceiling and then ripened into giant winter melons using bonemaling.
